title: The Weekly Challenge - 229
task1_desc: You are given an array of strings.
task1_body: You are given an array of strings. Write a script to delete element which is not lexicographically sorted (forwards or backwards) and return the count of deletions. #### Example 1 Input: @str = ("abc", "bce", "cae") Output: 1 In the given array "cae" is the only element which is not lexicographically sorted. #### Example 2 Input: @str = ("yxz", "cba", "mon") Output: 2 In the given array "yxz" and "mon" are not lexicographically sorted.
task2_desc: You are given three array of integers.
task2_body:
You are given three array of integers. Write a script to return all the elements that are present in at least 2 out of 3 given arrays. #### Example 1 Input: @array1 = (1, 1, 2, 4) @array2 = (2, 4) @array3 = (4) Ouput: (2, 4) #### Example 2 Input: @array1 = (4, 1) @array2 = (2, 4) @array3 = (1, 2) Ouput: (1, 2, 4)
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 13th August 2023**.
